instructions.content: Before running any check, verify that Node.js 18+ is available and that the working directory is the repo root.
Run checks in order: build first (fastest failure), then orphan detection, then ADR index freshness, then LLM audit.
NEVER skip the build check — a broken build blocks the deployment CI job and wastes a commit cycle.
NEVER commit an orphan page — pages not linked from any index are invisible to site visitors and search.
NEVER add an ADR without updating docs/ADR/index.yaml — the index entry is the canonical discovery mechanism.
When reporting results, always state whether each check passed or failed, and if failed, provide the remediation command.
